inline_comments.message: What is your plan with memcached ?

Memcached must be running in another container. And a orchestration tool(e.g. kubernetes) needs to manage the life-cycle of them. Having multiple services running in a single container makes hard to scale out.

In the other hand, given that the Dockerfile is pulling the previous zip file[1], this patch needs to be split in two. I'm going to modify this patch to avoid any problem during the Docker building process.

[1] https://git.onap.org/multicloud/openstack/tree/ocata/docker/Dockerfile#n24
